properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I hear the Saviour say Thy strength indeed is small Child of weakness, watch and pray Find in Me thine all in all

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Jesus paid it all All to Him I owe Sin had left a crimson stain He washed it white as snow

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Lord, now indeed I find Thy power And Thine alone can change The leper's spot And melt the heart of stone

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Since nothing good have I Where by Thy grace is claim I'll wash my garment white In the blood of Calvary's Lamb

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: And when before the throne I stand in Him completed I'll lay my trophies down All down at Jesus' feet
